title: Augusta Leigh
body: Augusta Maria Leigh (née Byron; 26 January 1783 – 12 October 1851) was the only surviving daughter of  John "Mad Jack" Byron, the poet Lord Byron's father, by his first wife, Amelia, née Darcy (Lady Conyers in her own right and the divorced wife of Francis, Marquis of Carmarthen).
